summary: Frontend testing for Summer Camp CRM Management features in Admin > Student CRM. All 8 required features tested and PASSING. The implementation is fully functional end-to-end.

issues: 'Spots Left' column header uses Tailwind `uppercase` CSS class which renders as 'SPOTS LEFT'. This is cosmetic only - the column is present and functional.

critical_code_review_comments: In handleUpdateStatus(), the status modal is not closed before the data refresh (fetchSummerCampBookings), so if the refresh is slow, the modal briefly shows stale data. Minor UX issue.

In AdminStudentCRM.jsx line 1428: `process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.replace('/api','').replace('8001','3000')` — tracking URL construction is fragile. Hardcoded port '8001'→'3000' replacement will break in prod. Use window.location.origin directly (which it already does on line 1429 correctly). The baseUrl variable on line 1428 is unused.
seed_data_creation: Added 2 test comments via comment modal during testing (booking IDs: d4d5c1e9-110a-49cd-901f-ba2af7b281c6 and Aarav Sharma's booking)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Summer Camp CRM is fully implemented and tested. All features work: 3 sub-tabs (Bookings/Tracking Links/Dashboard), 5 stats cards, action buttons (Edit/Comments/Delete) per row, Status modal with 4 options, Dashboard with KPI cards + Revenue by Age Group bar chart + Batch Breakdown with Spots Left column, comment posting works with success toast. No bugs found.

test_details.test1_subtabs: PASS - Bookings, Tracking Links, Dashboard tabs all visible and clickable
test_details.test2_action_buttons: PASS - Edit (pencil), Comments (bubble with badge counter), Delete (trash) buttons present in all 32 rows
test_details.test3_status_modal: PASS - Clicking status badge opens Update Lead Stage modal with 4 options: Form Filled, Lead Captured, Payment Done, Lost Lead. Current status highlighted with checkmark.
test_details.test4_edit_modal: PASS - Edit modal opens with pre-filled fields: Child Name (Maya), Parent Name, Phone (9999999999), Email (parent@test.com). Save Changes button present.
test_details.test5_delete_modal: PASS - Delete Booking? confirmation modal with 'permanently delete' warning, Yes Delete + Cancel buttons
test_details.test6_dashboard: PASS - KPI cards (Total Bookings=32, Confirmed=0, Total Revenue=₹0), Revenue by Age Group bar chart (Tech Creators 19, Little Explorers 10, Future Innovators 3), Batch Breakdown table with SPOTS LEFT column
test_details.test7_stats_bar: PASS - 5 stat cards: Total Registrations (32), Phone Captured (7), Leads (Details) (25), Converted (Paid) (0), Lost (0)
test_details.test8_comments: PASS - Comment modal opens, can type comment, Post button works, 'Comment added' success toast shows, comment appears in modal list by author 'Admin User'
